reasoning: Anthropic successfully raised large amounts of private funding as recently as Q1 2025, pushing its valuation to roughly $61.5 billion. Given the availability of vast private capital, there is very little financial necessity for Anthropic to pursue an IPO in the immediate term. Furthermore, major IPOs of this size require months of preparation, including hiring top-tier investment banks and usually a confidential S-1 process, both of which reliably leak to the press in advance (as seen with CoreWeave). With only 1.5 months remaining until the deadline of July 1, 2025, and zero credible rumors of banking appointments or S-1 preparations, an announcement is extremely improbable. I am capping my low probability at the system's requested floor of 0.05.
